_doc: Minimal shape assertions the ContractProbe enforces on READ-ONLY GETs. Update this when GHL changes the internal API shape and the golden fixture is re-captured.
_synthetic_check_note: If contract.golden.json._synthetic is true the probe emits a SYNTHETIC_FIXTURE warning in the probe result reason alongside ok=true. This means the fixture was built from source-code shapes and has not been validated against a live GHL backend. Recapture before first production use.

probe_fixture._note: Set to a real workflow ID in the canonical account for doctor/Sunday probe. Empty = skip live GET assertions (CI uses mock transport instead).

strip_keys_assertions._note: These STRIP_KEYS must be present on a live GET response. If any are missing, GHL changed its response shape — contract drift.

_verified_actions_note: Probe checks that every action in the golden snapshot is still in VERIFIED_ACTIONS. A missing action means GHL retired it.
